overall.description: Gameplay footage from a wizarding school video game showing a student in Gryffindor robes exploring the common room and adjacent areas. The character walks through wood-paneled corridors, descends a grand staircase, enters a spacious common room with a stone fireplace and tapestries, and explores a side storage room containing a large stained glass window.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with wooden paneling and portrait gallery

events.description: character enters the interior space through the lattice door from outside
character begins descending the curved wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor and descending the wooden staircase, passing framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: intricate wooden lattice screen door at the entrance
dark wood paneled walls with decorative trim
collection of framed paintings hanging on the corridor walls
large circular patterned rug covering the wooden floor
elegant wooden staircase with carved bannisters descending to lower level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view through a wooden lattice door before entering a richly decorated corridor. The character, wearing dark robes with a red and gold scarf, walks across an ornate carpet and descends a curved wooden staircase lined with framed portraits, transitioning from the entrance area to the lower level of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower corridor approaching stone archway to common room

events.description: reaches the bottom of the stairs and enters the lower stone-floored corridor
approaches the large stone archway entrance to the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower corridor toward the stone archway, passing bulletin boards and other students

notable_agents.action: group of students gathered near the common room entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway serving as entrance to the common room
wooden notice board covered with papers and announcements
tall wooden storage cabinet with drawers

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the character walks through a lower corridor with stone flooring toward a large stone archway. The space features wooden cabinets, bulletin boards, and a few scattered students near the entrance to the common room ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with fireplace and tapestries

events.description: passes through the stone archway into the large common room space
turns left to explore the side of the room with large windows and armor display

agents.ego_description: entering the spacious common room and exploring the area, observing the fireplace, tapestries, and other students relaxing

notable_agents.action: students gathered near the fireplace conversing
student sitting at a wooden desk studying

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with mantel as the focal point of the room
large decorative wall hangings with red and gold colors
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned panes letting in natural light
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall
wooden door frame leading to a side storage room

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand common room with high ceilings, a massive stone fireplace, and red tapestries adorning the walls. Sunlight streams through tall gothic windows as students relax and converse near the fire. The character explores the left side of the room, passing a suit of armor and approaching a wooden doorway leading to a side chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: side storage room with stained glass window

events.description: enters the wooden doorway into the side room with the stained glass window
approaches the towering stack of chairs reaching toward the ceiling

agents.ego_description: entering a cluttered side room and examining the interior including a large circular stained glass window and a silver lion statue

entered.detail: large circular stained glass window with blue and gold geometric patterns
tall silver statue of a lion standing on a pedestal
tall precarious stack of wooden chairs reaching toward the ceiling
wooden easel holding a canvas near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a smaller side room through a wooden doorway, revealing a space with a magnificent circular stained glass window casting colored light onto the stone walls. The room contains various stored items including a silver lion statue, a painting easel, and a remarkably tall stack of wooden chairs. The character explores this cluttered storage area, looking up at the towering chair stack.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded wooden entryway through a grand living space and into a cluttered, light-filled storage chamber. It begins by passing through a wooden lattice door into a richly decorated corridor, where the character in red and gold robes descends a curved wooden staircase lined with framed portraits. As the camera reaches the lower level, the environment shifts to a stone-floored corridor filled with cabinets and students before passing through a large archway. The scene then expands into a grand common room characterized by high ceilings, red tapestries, and sunlight streaming through gothic windows, moving past a suit of armor toward a side doorway. Finally, the camera enters a smaller side room where the atmosphere transforms into a cluttered storage area, highlighted by a magnificent circular stained glass window and a towering stack of wooden chairs.
